zh.lifeSummary: 當Alicia de Dalsallock於1230年出生在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾萊斯馬哈格福時，她的父親de Dalsallock21歲，母親Mrs. de Dalsallock21歲。她於1245年之前與Hugh Crawford 5th Laird of Loudoun在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1258年在蘇格蘭艾斯爾盧度享年28歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭艾斯爾盧度。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alicia de Dalsallock于1230年出生在英国苏格兰藍納可爾萊斯馬哈格福时，她的父亲de Dalsallock21岁，母亲Mrs. de Dalsallock21岁。她于1245年之前与Hugh Crawford 5th Laird of Loudoun在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1258年在苏格兰艾斯爾盧度享年28岁，埋葬在苏格兰艾斯爾盧度。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Alicia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

variants.name: Alisha
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

variants.name: Alisia
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Alicia de Dalsallock was born in 1230, in Lesmahagow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, de Dalsallock, was 21 and her mother, Mrs. de Dalsallock, was 21. She married Hugh Crawford 5th Laird of Loudoun before 1245, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1258, in Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland, at the age of 28, and was buried in Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alicia de Dalsallock est née en 1230, à Lesmahagow, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, de Dalsallock, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Mrs. de Dalsallock, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh Crawford 5th Laird of Loudoun avant 1245, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1258, à Loudoun, Ayrshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 28 ans, et a été enterrée à Loudoun, Ayrshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alicia de Dalsallock 1230 in Lesmahagow, Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater de Dalsallock 21 und ihre Mutter Mrs. de Dalsallock 21. Sie hat vor 1245 in Scotland Hugh Crawford 5th Laird of Loudoun geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1258 im Alter von 28 Jahren in Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland und wurde in Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alicia de Dalsallock è nata il nel 1230 nel Lesmahagow, Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, de Dalsallock, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Mrs. de Dalsallock, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Hugh Crawford 5th Laird of Loudoun prima del 1245, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1258, nel Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland, all'età di 28 anni, e fu sepolta a Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ja.Draffan, Lanarkshire, Scotland: スコットランドラナルクシュアイアドラファン
ja.lifeSummary: Alicia de Dalsallockが1230年にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアレスマーハゴウで生まれた時，父de Dalsallockは21歳，母Mrs. de Dalsallockは21歳であった。1245年以前にスコットランドでHugh Crawford 5th Laird of Loudounと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1258年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアロウドウンで28歳で死去し，スコットランドエイルシュアイアロウドウンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alicia de Dalsallock(이)가 1230년 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 레스마하고에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 de Dalsallock(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. de Dalsallock(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1245년 이전 스컷랜드에서 Hugh Crawford 5th Laird of Loudoun(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1258년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 루다운에서 28세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 에이르실르 루다운에 묻혔다.

mn.Lesmahagow, Lanarkshire, Scotland: Lesmahagow, Lanerk, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alicia de Dalsallock nasceu em 1230, em Lesmahagow, Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, de Dalsallock, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. de Dalsallock, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugh Crawford 5th Laird of Loudoun antes 1245, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1258, em Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland, com 28 anos, e foi sepultada em Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alicia de Dalsallock родилась в 1230 г. в местности лесмахагоу, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени de Dalsallock было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Mrs. de Dalsallock, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh Crawford 5th Laird of Loudoun перед 1245 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1258 г. в местности лоудоун, аиршир, Шотландия в возрасте 28 лет и была похоронена в местности лоудоун, аиршир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alicia de Dalsallock nació en 1230, en Lesmahagow, Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, de Dalsallock, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Mrs. de Dalsallock, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Hugh Crawford 5th Laird of Loudoun antes de 1245, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1258, en Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland, a la edad de 28 años, y fue sepultada en Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland.
